description: The article from ilrestodelcarlino.it reports on an investigation led by Full Professor Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino concerning how algorithms, particularly on platforms like TikTok, influence user behavior and contribute to echo chambers on topics such as the green pass.

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: The article details a research study published on January 7, 2026, by Professor Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino. The study concludes that institutional political visibility on Facebook has declined, allowing for the rise of anti-European, pro-Russian, and conspiracy-theory extremist content.
description: This article from Open.online details a recent study by Professor Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, which found that Facebook's algorithm is punishing official political content while promoting anti-European and extremist views.

title: Algoritmi Meta, più spazio agli estremisti e meno alla politica ufficiale
snippet: This news piece covers an independent academic study, led by Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino, which analyzed over 2.5 million Facebook posts from 2021 to 2025. The findings indicate that Meta's algorithms have amplified extremist content while reducing the visibility of official political communication.
description: A news article reporting on an independent academic study led by Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino, analyzing Facebook posts to show Meta's algorithms amplify extremist content.
